title: Trump administration lifts sanctions on millions of barrels of Iranian oil
summary_full: The Treasury Department’s authorization of the sale of Iranian crude already at sea is likely to provide revenue for Iran’s war effort against the U.S.
summary_public: The Treasury Department’s authorization of the sale of Iranian crude already at sea is likely to provide revenue for Iran’s war effort against the U.S.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: provide revenue for Iran’s war effort
